message:
Expand reqcheck with structured logging and add conformance tests

reqcheck binary: Add correlation_id, duration_ms, and assertion
pass/fail counts to JSONL log output for CI integration. Track
execution timing via Instant.

fcp-cli new: Add additional generated file templates and test
assertions for connector scaffolding.

conformance: Add schema_hash_determinism test verifying that
requirements index schema hashing produces consistent results
across runs. Bump conformance crate version.

Also regenerate CBOR test vectors and sync beads tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
